title: Cryopreservation of tissues for primary cell culture and single cell sequencing

steps: Collect tissues in the Cryoprotective Freezing Medium with ROCK inhibitor.
Resuspend in 500 µL, primary cell medium and 500 µL, cryoprotective freezing medium + 0.5 µL, ROCK inhibitor .
Cells should be frozen slowly at 1 °C, per minute . This can be achieved using the CoolCell containers at a -70 °C to -90 °C freezer overnight, then transferring to liquid nitrogen storage.
creator: Harikrishna Nakshatri
